basic_details.job_title: CAU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Agricultural University (CAU) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website cau.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CAU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PwBD; additional 5 years for contractual staff at CAU or other Govt. institutions.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in relevant subject with 55% marks or Ph.D with published papers; NET qualification as applicable
qualification.details: Genetics & Plant Breeding: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students. Animal Nutrition: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students. Vegetable Science: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic and career performance Interview Presentation/Seminar
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CAU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.central_agricultural_university_cau: Master's degree in relevant subject with 55% marks or Ph.D with published papers; NET qualification as applicable

content_sections.heading: CAU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CAU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CAU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Genetics & Plant Breeding: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students. Animal Nutrition: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students. Vegetable Science: Master's degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. Evidence of having cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by ICAR, ASRB, UGC, CSIR (NET shall not be required in disciplines for which NET is not conducted). Or Ph.D in relevant subject with published Research papers in scientific journals. Desirable: Experience of teaching Under Graduate/Post Graduate students.

content_sections.heading: CAU Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PwBD; additional 5 years for contractual staff at CAU or other Govt. institutions.

content_sections.heading: CAU Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on academic and career performance Interview Presentation/Seminar

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CAU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CAU Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CAU Assistant Professor recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted online before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in the relevant subject with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade point. A Ph.D. with published research papers or NET qualification is also required as applicable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor positions is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Assistant Professor post at Central Agricultural University (CAU).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 57,700/- per month, which corresponds to Academic Level 10.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CAU Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic and career performance, followed by an interview and a presentation/seminar.

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is the Central Agricultural University located?
faq.answer: The Central Agricultural University is located in Imphal, Manipur.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Assistant Professor positions at CAU?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official CAU website on or before the last date. Ensure all details are correctly filled and documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific disciplines for which the Assistant Professor posts are advertised?
faq.answer: Yes, the vacancies are for specific disciplines including Genetics & Plant Breeding, Animal Nutrition, and Vegetable Science.
